claims.claim_text: Multimodal reasoning can be applied in an AI-powered virtual assistant that interprets text, images, and voice commands simultaneously.
Code generation capabilities can be utilized in an IDE assistant that helps developers write code more efficiently by providing real-time suggestions.
Real-time search can enhance customer support chatbots by allowing them to provide up-to-date information and resources to users.
